description: Create the full mccp.html page at /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html following the project design system, including hero section, product info with question-based content, premium tables, error-free JSON lookup premium calculator, medical requirements, FAQ, and CTA sections.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html with the standard page structure: DOCTYPE, head with meta, title, link to /assets/style.css, dark mode init script, and page-specific <style> block

Add
at start of body for component loader
Add breadcrumb navigation (Beranda > Produk > MCCP) following the pattern in msp.html

Create a hero section with MCCP branding (product badge, h1 using question-based language with .kw, .kw-cta, .kw-gold keyword highlights, stat grid showing key numbers like 150 penyakit, usia 85 tahun, tanpa survival period), CTA buttons for WhatsApp and calculator anchor
Add page-specific CSS variables (--mccp-green, --mccp-dark, --mccp-light) and custom styles for hero, stats, cards, tables, and calculator following the pattern in msp.html

Create product info section using question-based language (bahasa pertanyaan) to make users think about the value of MCCP. Include: what is MCCP, 2 plan options comparison, key benefits (150 diseases, no survival period, end of term benefit at age 85). Use .kw, .kw-cta, .kw-gold classes for keyword coloring.
Create a Plan comparison section with grid cards comparing Plan 1 (Basic - 85 diseases) vs Plan 2 (Complete - 150 diseases) with their respective benefits

Create premium table section showing sample premium rates for Plan 1 and Plan 2, male and female, for common ages (25-50) with all 4 MPP options (10, 15, 20, RP), using the data from Sample/Mccp.html tables

Create the premium calculator section using .calculator-wrap, .calc-header, .calc-body, .calc-grid, .form-group, .form-label, .form-select pattern. Include select inputs for: Plan (1/2), Gender (Pria/Wanita), Usia (0-60), MPP (10/15/20/RP), UP (0.5M/1M/1.5M/2M/2.5M/5M/10M)

Embed the COMPLETE premium data JSON from Sample/Mccp.html into the page as a JavaScript object (the PREMIUM_DATA variable). This JSON has keys in format 'plan|gender|age|mpp' mapping to UP values. Extract ALL entries from the Sample file for ages 0-60.

Implement the calculator lookup function: given plan, gender, age, mpp selections, look up the key in PREMIUM_DATA, get the premium for selected UP. Display result in Juta Rupiah format. Show payment modes (tahunan, semesteran x0.52, kuartalan x0.27, bulanan x0.09). Handle '-' (not available) cases with an appropriate message. Validate minimum premium Rp 5 juta. The calculator must be error-free using pure JSON lookup, NO mathematical formulas.
Add medical requirements checker logic: based on age groups and UP amounts, show whether medical examination is required or not (standard Manulife underwriting rules)

Create FAQ section using the design system's .faq-list, .faq-item, .faq-trigger, .faq-question, .faq-icon, .faq-body, .faq-answer classes. Include 10-12 FAQs about MCCP (from Sample/Mccp.html content) written in question format
Add CTA section with gradient background encouraging users to contact the agent via WhatsApp

Add
for footer component loading
Add <script src='/assets/main.js'></script> at the end of body
Ensure dark mode compatibility by using CSS variables and html.dark overrides for custom colors
acceptance_criteria: Page contains div#site-header and div#site-footer for component loading
Hero section uses question-based (bahasa pertanyaan) language with keyword coloring via .kw, .kw-cta, .kw-gold classes
Premium calculator uses embedded JSON data lookup (PREMIUM_DATA object) with keys in format 'plan|gender|age|mpp' for all ages 0-60, both genders, both plans, all MPP options
Calculator displays result in Juta Rupiah with payment mode breakdown (tahunan, semesteran, kuartalan, bulanan)
Calculator handles 'not available' combinations showing appropriate error message
Premium table section shows rate tables for Plan 1 and Plan 2
FAQ section uses design system .faq-list/.faq-item/.faq-trigger pattern
Page has proper dark mode support with html.dark CSS overrides
HTML is well-formed with no syntax errors
verification: Run: grep -c 'PREMIUM_DATA' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html to confirm JSON data is embedded
Run: grep -c 'site-header' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html to confirm component loading divs
Run: grep -c 'style.css' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html to confirm CSS link
Run: grep -c 'main.js' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/public/pages/mccp.html to confirm JS loading
